architecture.summary: Re-fetch marketplace.json from GitHub raw URL for marketplace sources. Full plugin dir update when pluginDir=true. No lockfile schema changes.

integrations.summary: GitHub raw URLs for github: sources, registry API for registry: sources, local filesystem for local: sources. GITHUB_TOKEN propagated from env.

ui-ux.summary: N/A - CLI command, no UI. Console output with colored status messages.

performance.summary: N/A - CLI tool, one-shot command. Marketplace.json roundtrip is cheap.

security.summary: Tier 1 scan on ALL new content regardless of source. Same security scanning as install flow.

edge-cases.summary: Partial failures continue with successes. Missing/malformed source falls back to registry with dim warning. Local sources print skip message.
